# Retrospective: Sprint 9 & Beta.1 Release

**Date**: 2026-02-04  
**Trigger**: Sprint 9 completion + beta.1 release milestone  
**Participants**: @team-lead, @architect, @developer, @reviewer, @tester, @tech-writer, @security

---

## 1. What Went Well?

| Observation | Evidence |
|-------------|----------|
| **Full task automation delivered** | 6 step handlers, TaskExecutor, TaskApprovalModal all working |
| **Natural language intent detection** | TaskIntentDetector detects 6 intent types with confidence scoring |
| **Persistent history with rollback** | TaskHistoryManager tracks all operations, enables full undo |
| **Comprehensive test coverage** | 669 tests, 86% branch coverage maintained |
| **Clean beta.1 release** | Tag pushed, README updated, CHANGELOG complete |
| **Quick TypeScript fix turnaround** | 26 VS Code errors fixed in single session |
| **Handler architecture scaled well** | Adding new step types is straightforward |

---

## 2. What Could Improve?

| Issue | Impact | Proposed Action |
|-------|--------|-----------------|
| **TypeScript errors slipped in** | 26 errors in VS Code after release | Add `tsc --noEmit` to pre-commit checklist |
| **TaskPlan.name field added late** | Multiple test files needed updates | Better ADR review before implementation |
| **MoveNoteParams used wrong field** | Tests used `destination` vs `newPath` | Stricter type checking in test mocks |
| **Unused backup parameter** | Dead code in createTaskExecutor | Pre-flight review of function signatures |
| **VS Code caching false positives** | 2 phantom module errors remain | Document workaround (restart TS server) |

---

| createTaskExecutor factory | ✅ Complete | All 6 handlers wired |
| TaskHistoryView | ✅ Complete | 12 tests, filter/rollback UI |
| Integration tests | ✅ Complete | 8 E2E flow tests |

## 9. Beta.1 Release Notes

Released as `v1.0.0-beta.1`:

- **TaskIntentDetector**: Natural language task detection
- **TaskHistoryManager**: Persistent history with rollback
- **TaskHistoryView**: UI for browsing past operations
- **Enhanced system prompt**: AI instructed on task format
- **Full ChatView integration**: Review & Execute buttons

---

## Next Retro

Schedule after Sprint 10 or 1.0 release preparation, whichever comes first.
